title: Trove of BS
relevance_summary: Manipulated ICO with extended sale period followed by rapid token dump

prevention.rule: Block any tx that modifies ICO parameters shortly before closing

red_flags: Large buy orders materializing shortly before ICO close
Founder blaming coordinated wallets for manipulation
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ICO parameter modifications within X minutes of close
summary: The ICO was manipulated by extending the sale period, causing large losses to early investors. A guard could have detected and blocked such manipulations by monitoring for quick changes to ICO parameters near the close.
